projectDescription: Vue 3 wrapper for Tippy.js tooltip library with directive, component, and composition API support
keyFeatures: Three usage flavors: directive (v-tippy), component (<Tippy/>), and composition API (useTippy)
TypeScript support out of the box
Singleton tooltips for smooth transitions between multiple tooltips
Accessible by default with WAI-ARIA compliance
Themeable with built-in themes (light, material, translucent)
Multiple animation options with custom animation support
Optimized positioning engine with flip and overflow prevention
Interactive tooltips with rich content support including Vue components
publicApiSurface: useTippy(target, props) - Composition API for attaching tooltips to elements
useTippyComponent(options) - Composable for advanced component usage
useSingleton(targets, props) - Composition API for singleton tooltips
<Tippy> - Component for creating tooltips with template syntax
<TippySingleton> - Component for creating singleton tooltip groups
directive - Vue directive for simple tooltip usage (v-tippy)
plugin - Vue plugin for global installation
tippy(targets, props) - Direct access to Tippy.js instance
hideAll(options) - Utility to hide all tooltips
setDefaultProps(props) - Set global default props for all tooltips
